mapper.select: SELECT task_id, instance_id, node_key, node_name, task_status, assignee_type, assignee_ref_id, resolved_assignee_id, completed_by, action_type, comment, created_at, completed_at FROM ticket_workflow_task WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND task_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY task_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT task_id, instance_id, node_key, node_name, task_status, assignee_type, assignee_ref_id, resolved_assignee_id, completed_by, action_type, comment, created_at, completed_at FROM ticket_workflow_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}

SELECT task_id, instance_id, node_key, node_name, task_status, assignee_type, assignee_ref_id, resolved_assignee_id, completed_by, action_type, comment, created_at, completed_at FROM ticket_workflow_task WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND task_id < #{taskId} AND task_status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY task_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_workflow_task (instance_id, node_key, node_name, task_status, assignee_type, assignee_ref_id, resolved_assignee_id, completed_by, action_type, comment, created_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{instanceId}, #{nodeKey}, #{nodeName}, #{taskStatus}, #{assigneeType}, #{assigneeRefId}, #{resolvedAssigneeId}, #{completedBy}, #{actionType}, #{comment}, #{createdAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_workflow_task SET task_status = #{taskStatus}, completed_by = #{completedBy}, action_type = #{actionType}, comment = #{comment}, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND task_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT wt.task_id, wt.instance_id, wi.ticket_id, t.ticket_no, t.title, wt.node_key, wt.node_name, wt.task_status, wt.assignee_type, wt.created_at FROM ticket_workflow_task wt INNER JOIN ticket_workflow_instance wi ON wi.instance_id = wt.instance_id INNER JOIN ticket t ON t.ticket_id = wi.ticket_id AND t.del_flag = '0' WHERE wt.task_status = 'PENDING' AND (wt.resolved_assignee_id = #{userId} OR (wt.assignee_type = 'ROLE' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = ur.user_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.role_id = wt.assignee_ref_id AND u.status = '0' AND u.del_flag = '0' AND r.status = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0' ))) ORDER BY wt.created_at DESC, wt.task_id DESC

SELECT wt.task_id, wt.instance_id, wi.ticket_id, t.ticket_no, t.title, wt.node_key, wt.node_name, wt.task_status, wt.assignee_type, wt.created_at FROM ticket_workflow_task wt INNER JOIN ticket_workflow_instance wi ON wi.instance_id = wt.instance_id INNER JOIN ticket t ON t.ticket_id = wi.ticket_id AND t.del_flag = '0' WHERE wt.task_id = #{taskId}
